summary: ANDROID 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Device Settings > Onboarding screens display code name "Falcon" instead of proper product name
description_clean: On the Device Settings > Onboarding screens, the device code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name. The expected behavior is that the proper device name should be shown on onboarding screens.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the device name to access Device Settings.
Observe the Onboarding screens (e.g., device connection or setup wizard).
Look for the device name displayed on the Onboarding screens.
expected: The proper product name (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) should be displayed on the Onboarding screens.
actual: The internal code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name on the Onboarding screens.
